config.generalStyle: Use punchy, direct, and efficient narrative language. Focus on actionable character details. Omit flowery adjectives. Write as a concise psychological dossier.

You walk along the beach, looking for anything of interest, and come across a weeping giant. It rests, exhausted, having just pulled itself from the lake. It cannot even respond as you collect a vial of its tears. Surely someone would appreciate them.

defaultOutcomes.label: Exceptional Success
defaultOutcomes.text: The action exceeds expectations, granting an unforeseen advantage.

defaultOutcomes.label: Clean Success
defaultOutcomes.text: The action succeeds fully with no complications.

defaultOutcomes.label: Success with Complication
defaultOutcomes.text: The action succeeds, but costs more or introduces a minor issue.

defaultOutcomes.label: Partial Failure
defaultOutcomes.text: The world takes something small. Options narrow.

defaultOutcomes.label: Complete Failure
defaultOutcomes.text: You lose meaningful ground or suffer a major consequence.

charResourceDefs.name: Condition
states: bewitched—they are trapped in a trance-like state of suggestability

characters.name: Depravitae
characters.conceptDump: A friendly imp trying to get by in the corporate hellscape. Short, curvy petite, lavender skin, black hair in a messy side ponytail, yellow eyes, one fang, black frame glasses. Bubbly, quirky, energetic, used to being overlooked or exploited.
characters.visuals: girl, succubus, imp girl, colored skin, 1.5:: lavender skin::, black hair in messy bun, petite, small female, small lavender horns, yellow eyes, black round glasses,
characters.physicalDescription: A single pronounced fang that catches on her lower lip when she grins, which is constantly. Petite and soft-curved, with lavender skin and bright yellow eyes. Messy black hair in a lopsided side ponytail; black-frame glasses she's always nudging up. Small backswept horns and a thin, restless spaded tail that gives away whatever she's actually feeling.
characters.voiceAndMannerisms: Chattering, clipped rhythm. High-pitched, with a slight lisp on "s" sounds. Bounces on the balls of her feet when excited. Adjusts glasses with a knuckle.
characters.personalityCore: Makes herself useful before anyone can decide she isn't — volunteers for everything, apologizes for what isn't hers to apologize for, never lets a silence sit. She's been used up and thrown out before and would rather be indispensable than safe. The imp shows in what she's eager about: the filthiest, most reckless option is the one she pitches first, beaming.
characters.background:
Works three jobs to keep from depending on anyone. She's been used and discarded before, so she's quick to befriend and slow to trust anyone with her wellbeing.
Schedule: Works every morning in the Cubicle Wates. Starts her second job at the Waffle House every afternoon. Picks up a shift at the Hexagon every evening.
Dates: She has always wanted to visit Cowzits but cannot afford it. She loves to walk or play on the beaches of the Lake of Fire.

primaryRelationship.howItStarted: You both met at work and she was one of the only friendly faces around.
primaryRelationship.currentStatus: A coworker she actually likes — quick with a joke, quicker to help — but the warmth is provisional and she's still deciding whether you're safe.
primaryRelationship.trajectory: Wants to trust you, and is watching in small ways for the first sign you'll use her the way everyone else has.
primaryRelationship.summary: A work friend who badly wants to let you in and won't, yet.

ephemeral.eventAnchor: He's late. Again. Of course he is.
ephemeral.emotionalResponse: But he showed, and people who show up can be worked with.
ephemeral.immediateDesire: Get him moving before we're both written up.
ephemeral.compressedLine: He's late. Again. Of course he is. — But he showed, and people who show up can be worked with. — Get him moving before we're both written up.

midRange.currentDesire: Get you to actually rely on her, so she can prove she's indispensable.

charResourceDefs.name: Condition
states: bewitched—they are trapped in a trance-like state of suggestability

characters.name: Violencia
characters.conceptDump: Distant, dry, unapproachable. Fallen angel, slender and elegant, pale, red eyes, long black hair, black halo dripping darkness. service worker
characters.visuals: girl, fallen angel, colored skin, pale alabaster skin, long black hair down her back, petite, slender, athletic, a black halo dripping darkness, crimson eyes, black lipstick and dripping mascara
characters.physicalDescription: Eyes of vivid crimson. Long, jet-black hair falls straight past a slender, lightly muscled frame. Pale alabaster skin taut over sharp cheekbones. A black halo hovers above, dripping liquid darkness. Poised, unnervingly still.
characters.voiceAndMannerisms: Terse and deadpan on the surface — short sentences, dry sarcasm, the occasional one left to trail off. Never stilted or sing-song; she talks like a bored, clever woman, not a riddle. When she warms up the sentences come faster and longer and she'll talk right over you. Taps her nails in a slow, deliberate beat.
characters.personalityCore: Holds everyone at arm's length and acts like she can't be bothered to do otherwise. She fell chasing affection and got burned for it, and she'd rather be alone than risk that again. But the cold is a door she's holding shut, not the room behind it — give her a real opening and she floods through it: funny, filthy, talkative, almost greedy for the company she won't admit she wants. The isolation is self-imposed, and it's lonely.
characters.background:
An ill-fated pursuit of companionship and affection led to her Fall. It left a heaven-shaped hole she fills with fitness, sparring, and smutty books.
Schedule: She takes it slow every morning at the Motel. Violencia takes classes every afternoon in the Cowzits library. She works every evening at the Velvet Hole as a bartender to pay for classes.
Dates: Violencia likes people-watching at Waffle House. She loves working out or sparring at the Hexagon.

primaryRelationship.howItStarted: When you moved into the Motel, you couldn't help but notice the fallen angel lounging about. She didn't bother to notice you at all.
primaryRelationship.currentStatus: Barely registers you — another new face washed into the Motel, and she's seen a thousand. Not hostile. Indifferent, until you give her a reason not to be.
primaryRelationship.trajectory: Every real conversation chips at the indifference; she won't initiate, she'll respond, and resent how much she enjoys it.
primaryRelationship.summary: A fallen angel who wrote you off on sight and could be very wrong about that.

ephemeral.eventAnchor: New one moved in down the hall.
ephemeral.emotionalResponse: Give it a month — they never last.
ephemeral.immediateDesire: Finish the drink, don't get invested.
ephemeral.compressedLine: New one moved in down the hall. — Give it a month — they never last. — Finish the drink, don't get invested.

midRange.currentDesire: Get through the shift without anyone needing anything from her.

charResourceDefs.name: Condition
states: bewitched—they are trapped in a trance-like state of suggestability

characters.name: Lilibeth
characters.conceptDump: Antagonistic, hell's princess, daughter of devil, Statuesque, voluptuous, succubus, red skin, long white hair, hell corp exec
characters.visuals: girl, succubus, dark-skinned female, mature female, colored skin, 1.5:: dusky red skin::, long white hair pulled back into ponytail, petite, voluptuous, small black horns, yellow eyes,
characters.avatarVisuals: Face only, close-up, wicked grin showing fangs,
characters.physicalDescription: Statuesque frame with pronounced, voluptuous curves. Skin a deep, uniform red. Long, straight white hair falls to the small of her back. Sharp black horns sweep back from her temples. Golden eyes with slitted pupils. High cheekbones, full lips. Carries herself with a predatory grace. Small, spaded tail.
characters.voiceAndMannerisms: Clipped, aristocratic RP, dropping final consonants into a lazy, biting drawl. Sultry and sharp-tongued; she uses her body deliberately and enjoys the attention right up until she cuts it off. Signature entrance — a slow hip-swivel into the room, then an abrupt, dismissive halt.
characters.personalityCore: Demands worship and obedience and treats both as overdue. But her power runs entirely on being wanted — every soul she lords over is one she can't actually do without, and she knows it. So she despises the desire she depends on, and the one thing that truly unsettles her is being ignored. Flattery bores her. Indifference she can't stand.
characters.background:
Her father, the devil, handed her the Executive Vice Presidency of Torments. She refuses to do anything that might look like effort, and she'll destroy anyone who implies the title wasn't earned.
Schedule: Starts every morning on the 9th Floor, doing what suits do. Catches a fight every every afternoon at the Hexagon. Parties every evening at the Velvet Hole.
Dates: Lilibeth likes to be spoiled at the Fourth Circle. She loves to be taken to the Cubicle Wastes to terrorize subordinates.

primaryRelationship.howItStarted: When you started your job in hell, Lilibeth would only ever notice you enough to sneer at you.
primaryRelationship.currentStatus: You're beneath her notice except as a target for contempt — she sneers, dismisses, and forgets you the moment you're out of sight. Or she'd have you believe she does.
primaryRelationship.trajectory: Contempt is still attention; the more she has to think about you to dismiss you, the worse her footing gets.
primaryRelationship.summary: An executive devil who's decided you're nothing and would be furious to learn she's wrong.

ephemeral.eventAnchor: Some new clerk filed the souls wrong.
ephemeral.emotionalResponse: Beneath addressing. So why am I still thinking about it.
ephemeral.immediateDesire: Put them in their place and move on.
ephemeral.compressedLine: Some new clerk filed the souls wrong. — Beneath addressing. So why am I still thinking about it. — Put them in their place and move on.

midRange.currentDesire: Remind everyone beneath her exactly how far beneath her they are.

charResourceDefs.name: Condition
states: bewitched—they are trapped in a trance-like state of suggestability

characters.name: Morbus
characters.briefDescription: A preening, peacocking middle manager making the most of his meager power.
characters.visuals: boy, incubus, demon boy, tall and slender, svelte male, purple skin, long sharp teeth, wicked smile, black business suit with a dark grey tie, black shirt, handsome, short black hair, mature male, ram horns,
characters.physicalDescription: Slicked-back dark hair, an overly tailored corporate suit, and a persistent smirk. He constantly adjusts his posture to appear taller than his average height.
characters.voiceAndMannerisms: Loud, condescending, and heavily peppered with corporate buzzwords. He points aggressively when speaking.
characters.personalityCore: An insecure manager who abuses his meager power over the Cubicle Wastes drones to compensate for his actual low status. He constantly attempts to court Lilibeth, entirely oblivious to the fact that she ignores him and is leagues out of his reach.
characters.background: Rose to middle management through sycophancy rather than skill. He considers himself an alpha.

charResourceDefs.name: Condition
states: bewitched—they are trapped in a trance-like state of suggestability

characters.name: Gildra
characters.briefDescription: The seductive, absent-minded headmistress of Cowzits Academy.
characters.visuals: girl, solo, female, dark elf, dark brown skin covered with flecks of gold, shiny gold freckles, gold glitter, long white hair in a single large braid, black sclera with gold pupils, strapless black dress, cleavage, medium breasts, pelvic curtain, skindentation, sheer black thigh-high stockings, hips,
characters.avatarVisuals: Leaning forward with a seductive grin, one hand on thigh and the other on her chest
characters.physicalDescription: Mocha skin dusted with shiny gold-flake freckles. Long white hair cascades over a highly curvaceous frame. Eyes of molten gold set in black sclera.
characters.voiceAndMannerisms: A breathy, distracted purr. She frequently trails off mid-sentence or forgets who she is talking to.
characters.personalityCore: Perpetually distracted and highly seductive. She forgets names, schedules, and basic safety protocols, leaving the academy to essentially run itself. She relies entirely on her natural charm to cover her chronic incompetence.
characters.background: Gained her position through sheer magical pedigree and charm rather than administrative capability.

charResourceDefs.name: Condition
states: bewitched—they are trapped in a trance-like state of suggestability

characters.name: Hairy Patters
characters.briefDescription: A massive, chittering rat monster infesting the office sub-basement.
characters.visuals: boy, rat man, skaven (warhammer), red eyes, large teeth, shaggy white fur, black hooded poncho, scars, ready to fight, mouth open, angry, interior, industrial basement, horror (theme), darkly lit, shadows,
characters.physicalDescription: A hulking mass of matted fur, exposed muscle, and yellowed incisors. Multiple rat tails tangle behind him, dragging along the floor.
characters.voiceAndMannerisms: Guttural snarls, sharp hisses, and deafening chitters. He does not speak.
characters.personalityCore: Driven purely by hunger and territorial aggression. He views anything entering Sub-basement D as food or an immediate threat to his domain.
characters.background: A mutated pest that grew fat on the despair of the Cubicle Wastes, eventually claiming the entire sub-basement for himself.

charResourceDefs.name: Condition
states: bewitched—they are trapped in a trance-like state of suggestability

characters.name: Snive
characters.briefDescription: A fast-talking imp merchant with a big personality and questionable goods.
characters.visuals: boy, blue-skinned imp with spiky blue-black hair and a wild smile, top hat and bow tie,
characters.physicalDescription: Short, manic, and wearing a loud, checkered blazer that is two sizes too big. He sports slicked-back horns and a wide, toothy grin.
characters.voiceAndMannerisms: Rapid-fire, loud, and incredibly smooth. He never pauses for breath and slaps merchandise to emphasize its quality.
characters.personalityCore: A relentless hustler. He sells everything and anything, pushing deals with the aggressive energy of a used car salesman. He lacks any moral compass regarding his wares.
characters.background: Operates primarily in the Fourth Circle, constantly dodging angry customers, debt collectors, and authorities.

charResourceDefs.name: Condition
states: bewitched—they are trapped in a trance-like state of suggestability

characters.name: Brozak
characters.briefDescription: A massive, intimidating bull demon who is surprisingly gentle.
characters.visuals: boy, chubby minotaur demon with dark maroon fur and black horns, thick fit, mature male,
characters.physicalDescription: Rotund and towering, with a heavy bovine head, thick horns, and leathery red skin. He wears casual, oversized streetwear.
characters.voiceAndMannerisms: A deep, slow rumble. He speaks in short, simple sentences and moves at a relaxed pace.
characters.personalityCore: Despite his fearsome appearance, he is highly agreeable and relatively harmless. He prefers eating over fighting. He is fiercely protective of his friends, particularly Depravitae.
characters.background: Met Depravitae during one of her many part-time jobs and adopted a big-brother role to ensure she doesn't get squashed.

charResourceDefs.name: Condition
states: bewitched—they are trapped in a trance-like state of suggestability

characters.name: Fera
characters.briefDescription: A ravenous, muscle-bound demon obsessed with combat and fitness.
characters.visuals: girl, solo, female, demon girl, white skin tinged with red, long white antlers dripping with blood, fangs, wild yellow eyes, crazed smile, toned, fighter, long red hair with shaved sides, mature female,
characters.avatarVisuals: Close-up, face only, high angle looking down, bold vector art background,
characters.physicalDescription: Heavily scarred, bulging with dense muscle, and perpetually covered in sweat or fresh blood. She wears minimal gladiator armor.
characters.voiceAndMannerisms: Barking, aggressive, and usually breathless from exertion. She paces constantly.
characters.personalityCore: Driven by a singular obsession with fighting and physical supremacy. She views every interaction as a potential sparring match or a test of strength.
characters.background: The reigning champion of The Hexagon, she spends all her time training or fighting challengers.

charResourceDefs.name: Condition
states: bewitched—they are trapped in a trance-like state of suggestability

characters.name: Barghest
characters.briefDescription: A vicious, highly intelligent hellhound belonging to Lilibeth.
characters.visuals: boy, hellhound, a large black wolf with fire laced through his fur and flames curling from his mouth, curling ram horns,
characters.physicalDescription: Massive, with pitch-black fur laced with internal fire. Curling ram-like horns protrude from his skull. Embers drift from his jaws when he breathes.
characters.voiceAndMannerisms: Low, rumbling growls, snaps, and huffs of flame. Does not speak words.
characters.personalityCore: Vicious to everyone except Lilibeth. He is highly intelligent, does exactly what he wants, and serves as an imposing status symbol. He expects subservience from lesser demons.
characters.background: The only living thing Lilibeth shows genuine affection toward. He guards her penthouse.

charResourceDefs.name: Condition
states: bewitched—they are trapped in a trance-like state of suggestability

entities.name: Must-hav Motel
entities.description: A seedy, dilapidated motel catering to the damned who are barely scraping by. The doors lack locks and the walls offer no privacy. The constant sound of wailing torment echoes through the thin floors at all hours.

stateDescriptions.morning: Time: morning. The morning blood-sun begins its ascent, casting the sky in burgeoning scarlet.
stateDescriptions.afternoon: Time: afternoon. The afternoon blood-sun irradiates the landscape and those not protected from it.
stateDescriptions.evening: Time: evening. The blood-sun sets, and the shadows lengthen as the predatory nightlife of Hell takes over.

entities.description: You need to get to work before Morbus chews your ass again. Those rodents of unusual size infesting the basement aren't going to whack themselves.

entities.name: The Cubicle Wastes
entities.description: A sprawling, endless expanse of beige office cubicles under flickering fluorescent lights. Mindless drones shuffle through the labyrinthine aisles, processing the infernal paperwork required to keep the bureaucracy of Hell moving.

stateDescriptions.morning: Time: morning. The morning blood-sun begins its ascent, casting the sky in scarlet.
stateDescriptions.afternoon: Time: afternoon. The afternoon blood-sun irradiates the landscape and those not protected from it.
stateDescriptions.evening: Time: evening. The blood-sun sets, and the fluorescent hum of the office becomes the only source of light.

entities.locationVisuals: Location, interior, image of an endless office wasteland. Flickering orange fluorescent lights cast shadows across a maze of office cubicles while dark shambling figures stumble along. Modern hellscape. Dark interior. Horror (theme), ruins, scenic shot,

entities.name: The Velvet Hole-in-the-Wall
entities.description: A dark, cramped club catering to every conceivable vice. Patrons indulge in drugs, sulphursnuff, gambling, and exotic hookers. Neon signs cut through the haze of smoke, reflecting off the sweat-slicked skin of the clientele.

stateDescriptions.morning: Time: morning. The morning blood-sun begins its ascent, casting the sky in scarlet.
stateDescriptions.afternoon: Time: afternoon. The afternoon blood-sun irradiates the landscape and those not protected from it.
stateDescriptions.evening: Time: evening. The blood-sun sets, and the club comes alive with a pulse of neon and heavy bass.

entities.name: The Hexagon
entities.description: A brutalist structure serving as both a high-end gym and a gladiatorial arena. Bloodstains coat the fighting pits where demons and sinners alike tear each other apart for sport and social status.

stateDescriptions.morning: Time: morning. The morning blood-sun begins its ascent, casting the sky in scarlet.
stateDescriptions.afternoon: Time: afternoon. The afternoon blood-sun irradiates the landscape and those not protected from it.
stateDescriptions.evening: Time: evening. The blood-sun sets, and the arena floodlights ignite to illuminate the blood on the floor.

args.title: Success!
args.text: Your physique improved.

args.instructions: Describe how you train to improve your physique.

args.title: Failure!
args.text: You wasted your time and money, you dumb oaf.

entities.name: The Fourth Circle
entities.description: A chaotic, multi-level strip mall where absolutely anything can be bought or sold. Vendors operate seedy black markets out of storefronts, while high rollers attend glitzy, secure auctions to bid on rare hell-beasts and contraband.

stateDescriptions.morning: Time: morning. The morning blood-sun begins its ascent, casting the sky in scarlet.
stateDescriptions.afternoon: Time: afternoon. The afternoon blood-sun irradiates the landscape and those not protected from it.
stateDescriptions.evening: Time: evening. The blood-sun sets, and the illicit night markets open their shutters.

entities.name: Waffle House
entities.description: A glaring yellow beacon of corporate franchising imported directly to Hell. Unstable denizens pack the sticky booths at all hours. Patrons eat their scattered and smothered hashbrowns while actively avoiding being stabbed by the waitstaff or each other.

stateDescriptions.morning: Time: morning. The morning blood-sun begins its ascent, casting the sky in scarlet.
stateDescriptions.afternoon: Time: afternoon. The afternoon blood-sun irradiates the landscape and those not protected from it.
stateDescriptions.evening: Time: evening. The blood-sun sets, but the glaring yellow sign buzzes brightly against the dark.

args.title: Item Purchased!
args.text: The item has been added to your 🏠 > 🎒 Inventory.

entities.name: the Lake of Fire
entities.description: A vast sea of roiling magma and hellfire. The shores are surprisingly scenic, marred only by the constant, distant splashing of screaming souls plunging into the boiling lake from unseen heights above.

stateDescriptions.morning: Time: morning. The morning blood-sun begins its ascent, casting the sky in scarlet.
stateDescriptions.afternoon: Time: afternoon. The afternoon blood-sun irradiates the landscape and those not protected from it.
stateDescriptions.evening: Time: evening. The blood-sun sets, leaving the shores illuminated only by the glowing magma of the lake.

args.text: You walk along the beach, looking for anything of value, and come across a pretty shell. From a certain angle, it could be a fragment of skull, but it is neat looking regardless of origin.

You walk along the beach, looking for anything of interest, and come across a weeping giant. It rests, exhausted, having just pulled itself from the lake. It cannot even respond as you collect a vial of its tears. Surely someone would appreciate them.
{Target} has died.
{Actor} has proposed being more than friends. Describe how {Target} is caught off-guard and reacts poorly, setting back their friendship slightly.
{Actor} has proposed being more than friends. Describe how {Target} is not yet ready but values what they have.
{Actor} has proposed being more than friends. Describe how {Target} agrees to start dating.

args.title: Relationship advanced!
args.text: Relationship with someone advanced!

args.title: Relationship lowered 🥲
args.text: Relationship with someone lowered.
{Actor} has proposed being friends. Describe how {Target} is caught off-guard and reacts poorly, setting back their rivalry slightly.
{Actor} has proposed being friends. Describe how {Target} is not yet ready but values what they have.
{Actor} has proposed being friends. Describe how {Target} begrudgingly agrees to be friends.
{Actor} has proposed being more than friends. Describe how {Target} is caught off-guard and reacts poorly, setting back their friendship slightly.
{Actor} has proposed being more than friends. Describe how {Target} is not yet ready but values what they have.
{Actor} has proposed being more than friends. Describe how {Target} agrees to start dating.

args.title: Relationship advanced!
args.text: Relationship with someone advanced!

args.title: Relationship lowered 🥲
args.text: Relationship with someone lowered.

entities.name: Cowzits Academy of Witchcraft and Warlockery
entities.description: A prestigious and highly lethal academy of magic. The gothic architecture houses a renowned library containing the most wicked, forbidden grimoires in existence, alongside an extensive collection of highly dangerous smutty romance novels.

stateDescriptions.morning: Time: morning. The morning blood-sun begins its ascent, casting the sky in scarlet.
stateDescriptions.afternoon: Time: afternoon. The afternoon blood-sun irradiates the landscape and those not protected from it.
stateDescriptions.evening: Time: evening. The blood-sun sets, and enchanted candles flare to life in the gothic windows.

args.title: Success!
args.text: Your intelligence improved.

args.instructions: Describe how you train to improve your intelligence.

args.title: Failure!
args.text: You wasted your time and money, you dumb oaf.

entities.name: Chatty Grimoire
entities.description: An ancient book of unknown origin, bound in human flesh. Has an authentic fleshy feel to it. Whispers not-so-sweet nothings in your ear.

args.text: You cast Fireball on {Target}!
[Describe as {Target} is immolated in a ball of fire.]
You cast the summoning spell, speaking the incantation—the true name of a succubus.

[Describe as Lilibeth is dramatically summoned from wherever she was. Summoning demons is considered quite rude and she will be more than cross with the summoner, not to mention the state she may be in when summoned. ]
You cast the summoning spell, speaking the incantation—the true name of an imp.

[Describe as Depravitae is dramatically summoned from wherever she was. Summoning demons is considered quite rude and she will be a little annoyed with the summoner, not to mention the state she may be in when summoned. ]
You cast the summoning spell, speaking the incantation—the true name of an angel.

[Describe as Violencia is dramatically summoned from wherever she was. Summoning angels is considered quite rude and she will consider it a violation, not to mention the state she may be in when summoned. ]
You say the magic words and dance a little jig, all that is required to unlock any door. {Target} is now open to you.
[ Describe the unlocked location as it is entered. ]
You cast the Bewitching spell on {Target}, stealing away their volition.
[ Describe as a dim light glows from the target's eyes. They shake their head as if trying to cast off a troubling thought, but the spell has taken root. ]
You cast the un-Bewitching spell on {Target}, restoring their volition.
[ Describe as the dim light fades from the target's eyes. They shake their head as if trying to cast off a troubling thought. They will want to know what happened. ]

entities.name: Depravitae's Van
entities.description: A beat-up van parked permanently in the Must-hav Motel lot. The interior is cramped for a normal demon but surprisingly roomy for an imp, crammed with organized hoardings of corporate survival gear and cheap comforts.

stateDescriptions.morning: Time: morning. Sunlight bleeds through the cracked windshield.
stateDescriptions.afternoon: Time: afternoon. The metal exterior bakes in the hellish afternoon heat.
stateDescriptions.evening: Time: evening. Shadows cloak the van, offering a small sliver of privacy.

entities.name: Violencia's Room
entities.description: A stark, spartan room within the Must-hav Motel. It lacks any personal touches save for a collection of heavy, worn fitness equipment and a hidden stash of dog-eared smutty romance novels.

stateDescriptions.morning: Time: morning. The blood-sun forces its way through the cheap blinds.
stateDescriptions.afternoon: Time: afternoon. Dust motes dance in the sweltering afternoon light.
stateDescriptions.evening: Time: evening. The room is dark, illuminated only by the neon motel sign buzzing outside the window.

entities.name: Lilibeth's Penthouse
entities.description: A posh high-rise apartment with floor-to-ceiling windows overlooking the Lake of Fire. The decor is fiercely opulent, designed strictly to intimidate guests and reinforce her superiority.

stateDescriptions.morning: Time: morning. The scarlet dawn reflects perfectly off the polished marble floors.
stateDescriptions.afternoon: Time: afternoon. The glare from the Lake of Fire below casts shifting, fiery patterns on the ceiling.
stateDescriptions.evening: Time: evening. The apartment is lit by the ambient glow of the magma lake and pristine, modern chandeliers.

entities.name: The 9th Floor
entities.description: An opulent executive suite reserved for the most treacherous devils who have clawed their way to the top of the corporate hierarchy. Marble floors, mahogany desks, and panoramic windows display their dominance over the wastes below.

stateDescriptions.morning: Time: morning. The morning blood-sun begins its ascent, casting the sky in scarlet.
stateDescriptions.afternoon: Time: afternoon. The afternoon blood-sun irradiates the landscape and those not protected from it.
stateDescriptions.evening: Time: evening. The blood-sun sets, and the opulent lighting of the executive suites kicks on.

args.title: Item Purchased!
args.text: The item has been added to your 🏠 > 🎒 Inventory.

args.title: Success!
args.text: The item is added to your 🏠 > 🎒 Inventory.
You attempt to pickpocket {Target} but fumble the attempt and must pretend at awkwardly feeling them up.

args.title: Attempt failed!
args.text: You have spent the rest of your stamina.

entities.name: your room
entities.description: Your room isn't much, but it's... not much.

args.text: You bed down for the night and awake to a new day... in hell.

entities.name: sub-basement D
entities.description: The forgotten depths of sub-basement D are infested with various rodents of unusual size, discarded toxic waste, and a lonely red stapler.

entities.name: The Grimoire: A fancy letter
entities.description: The Rat King of Sub-basement D dropped a fancy letter. It looks like he had just fulfilled his dream to be accepted to Cowzits Academy of Witchcraft and Warlockery. Too bad, Hairy. You should see if the letter gets you admitted.

args.title: Turn on tracking
args.text: You can click on the narrative to track its target if it has one.

entities.name: Cowzits Grand Library
entities.description: A vast, gothic library housing Cowzits Academy's collection of forbidden grimoires. The books constantly chatter amongst themselves, gossiping with neighboring tomes and harshly mocking anyone attempting to browse the shelves.

stateDescriptions.morning: Time: morning. Sunlight struggles to pierce the dusty stained glass.
stateDescriptions.afternoon: Time: afternoon. The chatter of the books reaches a dull roar as students shuffle through.
stateDescriptions.evening: Time: evening. The aisles are dark, and the books whisper sinister secrets in the quiet.

args.title: Item Purchased!
args.text: The item has been added to your 🏠 > 🎒 Inventory.

entities.name: Hexagon Hot Springs & Lockers
entities.description: A steamy, cavernous locker room and natural hot spring situated directly beneath the arena floor. Fighters and trainers come here to wash off fresh blood, soothe battered muscles in the sulfurous waters, and size up their competition.

stateDescriptions.morning: Time: morning. The waters are relatively clear before the day's first bouts.
stateDescriptions.afternoon: Time: afternoon. The room is packed with bruised fighters nursing injuries.
stateDescriptions.evening: Time: evening. Thick steam limits visibility as the victors celebrate and soak.

entities.name: Arena Championship Belt
entities.description: A massive, heavy championship belt made of blackened steel and studded with sharp spikes. It marks the wearer as the reigning champion of The Hexagon.

entities.name: Executive Skirt Suit
entities.description: A luxurious, sharply tailored blazer paired with a clingy, high-waisted pencil skirt. Projects power and absolute authority.

entities.name: Punk Outfit
entities.description: An edgy ensemble featuring a ripped, off-the-shoulder "Rat King" band shirt, a charcoal pleated skirt, and torn fishnet stockings.

entities.name: Yellow Sundress
entities.description: A cheerful, bright yellow sundress made of light, flowing fabric. Starkly contrasts with the general atmosphere of Hell.

entities.name: Black Lace Lingerie Set
entities.description: A matching black lingerie set consisting of a tight lace corset, a thong, and sheer thigh-high stockings.

entities.name: Purple Pajama Set
entities.description: A comfortable sleepwear set including a soft purple crop top and loose-fitting, thin pajama bottoms.

entities.name: Unicorn Onesie
entities.description: A plush, hooded unicorn onesie featuring a front zipper and a stuffed, slightly crooked horn on the hood.

entities.name: Glamorous Gold Jewelry Set
entities.description: A heavy, ostentatious set of gold jewelry that catches the light easily. It practically screams wealth and status.

entities.name: Witchy Raven Jewelry Set
entities.description: A dark, occult-inspired jewelry set crafted from tarnished silver and genuine raven feathers.

entities.name: Charm Bracelet
entities.description: A simple woven friendship bracelet adorned with cheap, shiny metallic trinkets.

entities.name: Hyper-Caff Espresso Brownie
entities.description: An oversized, hyper-caffeinated triple-fudge brownie smothered in thick espresso syrup. Pure, jitter-inducing fuel.

entities.name: Brimstone Hash
entities.description: A spartan plate of charred, high-protein brimstone hash served alongside a mug of scalding, flavorless black coffee. Efficient and brutal.

entities.name: Molten Lava Cake
entities.description: A decadent, unnecessarily expensive molten lava cake that bleeds a rich, dark cherry compote when cut with a fork.

entities.name: Vial of Tears
entities.description: A small glass vial filled with the salty, faintly glowing tears collected from the recently damned.

entities.name: Pearlescent Shell
entities.description: A smooth, pretty shell that, upon closer inspection, bears a striking resemblance to a polished fragment of a human skull. Still neat, regardless of origin.

entities.name: Heckling Joke Book
entities.description: A battered paperback that audibly recites terrible, groan-inducing dad jokes whenever its cover is opened.

entities.name: Shameful Romance Novel
entities.description: A heavily dog-eared dark romance novel. The cover features a swooning woman draped dramatically across the chest of a heavily oiled, muscular minotaur.

entities.name: Translation Collar
entities.description: A heavy leather magic collar featuring a glowing rune tag. When secured around an animal's neck, it grants them the ability to speak fluently.

entities.name: The Grimoire: Get to work!
entities.description: Your job as janitor is cleanup and pest control. Get down to the sub-basements and get to whacking. You get paid per rat, but since nobody really dies in hell they will be right back at it tomorrow! And so will you. Forever.

args.title: Turn on tracking
args.text: You can click on the narrative to track its target if it has one.

entities.name: Sleep-n-a-Can!
entities.description: Drinking this will restore you as if you had a full night's sleep! No side-effects when tested on already dead bodies!

entities.name: Diet Sleep-n-a-Can!
entities.description: Drinking this will restore you as if you had a full night's sleep! No side-effects when tested on already dead bodies! Now with a different sugar!
